rulings.Case Title: CHARLES LI VS. TONY FU et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, JANUARY 9, 2008 LINE 6. CROSS-DEFENDANT CHARLES LI'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT: RE INITIAL MISREPRESENTATION CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO PLEAD HOW LI'S REPRESENTATION WAS FALSE AT TIME MADE. CONCEALMENT CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO PLEAD HOW LI CONCEALED MATERIAL FACTS AT TIME ASSIGNMENT AGREEMENT WAS ENTERED. PROMISE WITHOUT INTENT TO PERFORM CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO PLEAD WHETHER LI INTENDED TO PERFORM AT TIME ASSIGNMENT AGREEMENT WAS ENTERED. NEGLIGENCE CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. INTENTIONAL TORT CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. =(302/PHA/AL)
